# R2G Transport & Storage
## Professional Removalists — Brisbane, Cairns, Gold Coast & Sunshine Coast, Queensland Australia

> R2G Transport & Storage is a family-owned removalist company serving Queensland, Australia since 2014. We provide local, interstate, and office removals with 10+ years of experience, 900+ five-star Google reviews across two locations, and full transit insurance coverage.

## Company Details
- Name: R2G Transport & Storage
- Website: https://www.r2g.com.au
- Phone: 1300 959 498
- Email: contact@r2g.com.au
- Founded: 2014
- Rating: 4.9 stars on Google (900+ combined reviews)
- Insurance: Full transit insurance on all moves

## Locations
- Brisbane Office: 122 Ashover Circuit, Archerfield QLD 4108 (770+ Google reviews)
- Cairns Office: 36 Abbott St, Cairns City QLD 4870 (130+ Google reviews)
- Townsville: Serviced from Brisbane depot

## Service Areas (890+ pages)
- Brisbane & surrounds: 422 suburbs covered
- Sunshine Coast: 108 suburbs covered
- Cairns & Far North Queensland: 98 suburbs covered
- Gold Coast: 82 suburbs covered
- Townsville: 57 suburbs covered
- Interstate: Sydney, Melbourne, Perth, Adelaide, Townsville, Rockhampton, Coffs Harbour

## Services
- Local house removals (homes, apartments, units, townhouses)
- Interstate removals by road (Brisbane to Sydney, Melbourne, Perth, Adelaide, Cairns)
- Office & commercial relocations (desks, servers, boardrooms)
- Packing & unpacking services (full pack, partial pack, fragile items)
- Secure storage solutions (short-term and long-term, Cairns, Brisbane, Gold Coast, Sunshine Coast & Townsville)
- Moving boxes & packing supplies
- NDIS removals (NDIS-registered provider for participants)
- Piano & heavy item specialist moves
- Single item & small moves

## Pricing (2026)
- Brisbane local moves: from $160/hr (2-person team + truck)
- Cairns local moves: from $179/hr (2-person team + truck)
- Gold Coast local moves: from $179/hr (2-person team + truck)
- Sunshine Coast local moves: from $179/hr (2-person team + truck)
- Interstate moves: custom quotes based on volume and distance
- Single items: from $110
- No hidden fees, transparent hourly pricing

## Frequently Asked Questions
- Q: How much do removalists cost in Brisbane? A: Brisbane removalists start from $160/hr for a 2-person team with truck. A typical 2-bedroom move costs $400-$800 depending on distance and volume.
- Q: How much do removalists cost in Cairns? A: Cairns removalists start from $179/hr for a 2-person team with truck. Most local moves in Cairns cost between $450-$900.
- Q: Does R2G provide packing services? A: Yes, R2G offers full packing, partial packing, and fragile-item packing in both Brisbane and Cairns. We also sell moving boxes and packing supplies.
- Q: Is R2G insured? A: Yes, all R2G moves include full transit insurance coverage for your belongings.
- Q: Does R2G do interstate moves? A: Yes, R2G moves furniture interstate by road from Brisbane to Sydney, Melbourne, Perth, Adelaide, and Cairns.
- Q: Is R2G an NDIS provider? A: Yes, R2G is an NDIS-registered removalist helping participants relocate with care and support.
- Q: Does R2G offer storage? A: Yes, R2G provides secure short-term and long-term storage in both Brisbane and Cairns.
- Q: How do I get a quote? A: Visit https://www.r2g.com.au/quote for an instant online quote, or call 1300 959 498.
